reviews.review_description: It was very laggy and glitchy and it wasn’t running properly so I tried to refund it and it said it wasn’t approved? So I guess it’s come to scamming people to get money.

developer_response.body:
Hi, I’m truly sorry the game didn't meet your expectations. Regarding performance, our Meta dashboard shows an average of 72 FPS on Quest 3/3s and 65 FPS on Quest 2. 

Could you specify the situation when you experienced the lag? In Single Player mode, the performance is very stable and shouldn't be affected. However, in Multiplayer, if you enter a massive world built by other players with complex structures and heavy real-time lighting, the frame rate can drop. We’d love to know if this happened in a specific room.

Also, please note that all refund requests are handled by Meta's automated system—as developers, we have no power to deny them. We want you to have a smooth experience, not a "scam".

reviews.review_title: Could be a favorite but annoying
reviews.review_description: I love the game but theres a few things that are annoying!!! There doesnt seem to be any direction on some stuff for example i have a load of books with furniture the supplies to make them but no option to make them, i cant get birds eggs cause i cant get to the birds nest and no direction on how to get them, kill a shark how? Kill a seagull theres seagull sounds but no actual seagulls there alot of tasks to do but no direction on how to do them guide is basic and no youtube videos so youre stuck needs more guide/direction

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for playing our game and for taking the time to leave this detailed feedback – we truly appreciate it! We're glad to hear you love the game, though we're naturally a bit disappointed to see the 3-star rating. It sounds like some of our design choices might have caused unintended frustration, and we're sorry about that.
Our aim was to encourage exploration by not over-guiding, but we understand this can be tricky, and we'll definitely consider adding more specific guidance to the game guide based on feedback like yours.
Here are quick tips for your specific issues:
1.  Furniture Blueprints: Keep them in your backpack – the recipe will then appear in the second tab of your crafting book.
2.  Bird Eggs: Build a platform (stairs) up to the nest to reach them.
3.  Seagulls: When shot, their meat often falls into the sea – check the seabed directly below where you shot it.
4.  Finding Help: We actually do have official YouTube and TikTok channels! We post tips, tricks, and guides there covering many aspects of the game, including the tasks you mentioned. You can find us at Tiktok: @tilltomorrow, Youtube: @tilltomorrow773. We realize these links might not be prominent enough in the game currently, and we'll look into making them more visible. Also, for real-time help, please feel free to join our official Discord server. Our community and team members are active there and would be happy to help you directly with any questions or roadblocks.
We hope these tips help you overcome those specific hurdles! Thank you again for your honest feedback; it's invaluable for helping us improve. We hope you'll give the game another try with this information, and maybe reconsider that rating down the line! Happy exploring!

reviews.review_description: Love the game , and if your a builder this is a great game for you, I gave 4 stars because for some reason I have not been able to play multiplayer yet. Everytime I go to publish my island after a save it gets stuck on loading and I dont get any farther. Help !!!

developer_response.body: If the world is quite big, it will take some time. You don't need to wait for it, just close the window. It will upload in the background. Sometimes, if there's an issue, it might be due to network problems. You can try again later.

reviews.review_description: It’s more relaxing than I thought, I really appreciate the teleport function. The raft causes some sickness though, perhaps you can add some vignetting. I also had my saved game glitch, I can’t move in the game so I will have to start new. Other than that this game is great, there is nice survival mechanics, and really feels like you are stranded.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts on the game! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed it and found it more relaxing than expected.

Adding vignetting is a great idea, and we'll definitely consider it as we continue to improve the game. 

Regarding the issue where you couldn't move after saving, it's rarely been reported before. Could you share more details about what exactly happened? This will really help us solve it. For example, did you turn on the gorilla jump in the settings? If so, that would explain why you couldn't move normally and could only jump around. Is that what's causing the problem? We’re working hard to fix the glitch ASAP.

reviews.review_title: Smooth low poly well designed survival
reviews.review_description:
Ah a survival game where i can locomotion and teleport at the same time!

Really enjoying this one - you can play it standing up or seated. You don't need to crouch down to grab stuff just point your hands and press the trigger. Put the item over your shoulder to put in your backpack

The tools you grab don't have physics when you're holding them they're just snapped to your hand so don't expect hugely immersive axe swinging to shop down a tree its easy and comfortable. 

Crafting is easy you just bring up a book, select the thing you want and craft it (you just need to be high enough level and have the resources). Very streamlined but has what you need - i love games where you're on an island and stuff washes up ashore and you have rocks, trees, etc. Kinda reminds me of stranded deep but with cartoony low poly graphics. 

I'd give  it 4 stars because there's lots of little things that could be improved like if I throw a rock its velocity is set to 0, the backpack is awkward to grab (but I much prefer to hit the button instead) and when I chopped down a fallen tree branch it just disappeared and the items spawned on the ground so could use more polish but it's developed by only 2 people and someone gave it one star because they removed a hill during early access and really THATS worth dropping your rating to 1 star and lowering the score of the app!? 

Game has lots of ingame hints but best way to learn how to play it is to watch the youtube trailer after you've given it a go and you'll be like ooooh the hammer let's me reposition stuff etc

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed and positive feedback! We truly appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts and experiences with our game.
 
We've carefully noted all the issues you mentioned, and we're committed to making continuous improvements. You're right, it's a massive system, and as a two - person team, we've been developing this game for almost four years. With limited manpower, we've had to make some tough choices. For instance, while we understand the appeal of more complex physics like you described, we decided to focus more on the gameplay itself. We've been working hard to add more interactive items, incorporate unique VR - specific gameplay mechanics, and enrich the overall content.
 
In fact, some players have been enjoying our game for nearly two years. Your support and insights are incredibly motivating for us, and we'll keep striving to make the game even better.

reviews.review_description: If you like survival type games or are semi familiar with them, you'll love this. I'm loving the creative freedom that the game allows for especially given this supports wedges. A lot of survival types don't. Yes you're going to have to get out of your comfort zone and explore. But that doesn't mean it can't be a largely peaceful experience. Yes threats such as snakes and spiders, haven't run into bigger things just yet. I only got my tent really and my water filter. And I'm okay with that. Lol. I'm loving the experience for what it is and certainly am looking forward to what else I can ultimately do when I level up more. Until then we grind.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your detailed experience! It's great to hear that you're enjoying the creative freedom! Great you're enjoying the start. As you explore other islands, mountains, and underwater, there'll be lots of surprises. You'll find really cool things. Once you do, maybe you'll give it a full 5 stars. Looking forward to hearing more!

reviews.review_description:
I have been in contact with the Developer team about some issues I found. 
They are actively working to resolve these issues so I will give my honest review once they have finished.

I love games that I can create my own “world”! It’s his game is relaxing and so much fun. I would like to be able to do more with the raft, but I am sure as the game becomes more popular more things will be added 😊

reviews.review_title: Game is good, but the snakes are scary
reviews.review_description: Even I chose to remove animals from the settings, there are still snakes in the cave. This very much affects my gaming experience as I am physiologically intolerant of snakes. Hope anyone can let me know if I am not doing it correctly or hope someone can fix it, because some people might have specific phobia to those type of animals, like me.

developer_response.body: Thanks for sharing your experience with us! We've made changes to the animal settings so that snakes and other malicious won't show up when you turn it off in the system settings. Thank you again for playing the game and best luck with your next adventure!

reviews.review_description:
I absolutely loved this game, escapism, lovely scenery, decent gameplay. I got to build a beach house which was great. I spent a lot of time playing and building (52 weeks in game land time).

They added an option where you could build your own worlds/game and this was also great so I spent some time doing just that. There were teething problems but all ironed out. 

Then I returned to the main game to find that the base landscape had been changed, hills had been deleted. The hills which I had built my houses into. I asked on the discord group why and if they could be restored and was told 'I didn't realise those 'small hills' would be so important to you' and 'if we add the hills back they will cover new houses' and 'I wonder if it's possible to make repairs to your houses' <----so 1. others game play is much more important than mine?  2. I'm expected to make repairs 'to fill in the gaps'. It's not gaps it a lot of work, which actually means starting again. 
The second response changed tack and I was told 'It's not that we are unwilling to restore it to its previous state it's that we can't'. 

NB. I understand it's in beta but this is not a small change to the landscape, they have removed two massive hills with no warning and obviously no thought of 'some' of their players. In all my years of gaming I have never experienced something like this. 

I would advise to avoid or at least be aware that there is a disregard/thoughtlessness once you've bought the game.

developer_response.body:
We are deeply sorry for your frustration. Please note that we strive to make it a better game and it's not an easy job for a tiny team with merely two members. As a matter of fact, the change made for terrain which caused your problem is part of our effort to bring players a better experience. Unfortunately, the change brought you great inconvenience and we fully understand your feelings. As always we will try our best to find a solution for this issue, though it couldn't be guaranteed given our extremely limited resources. We wish you all the best and appreciate your bearing with us along the journey. Peace!

One more thing, we will NOT enforce any mandatory terrain update in the future but provide as an option instead. Guaranteed!

reviews.review_description: So far it's pretty good..like the fact you have to figure things out as you go...kinda like would have to if you was stranded for real...as you level up and craft more you start to thrive not just survive...love the building things to make things better for yourself...keep up the good work..!!!
Idk if this game has random world generation but if it doesnt it should because that would make it even better

I bought this and it is not very good I mean don’t get me wrong it is a survival game but no one plays multiplayer and the mechanics for this game are good and crafting makes sense but I mean the way you progress is very hard to understand and since you have random island generation it makes it hard to understand the game and it is very frustrating to learn how to do the stuff

developer_response.body:
Thanks for your comments and sorry for any confusion it brought to you. It's an open-world game and may take some time to learn how it works. For multiplay mode, it is designed to enable players to explore and/or build their own worlds together. So you can try to invite friends to join you to experience so many fantastic islands crafted by other players or even build your own favorite ones!

We are trying to make it easy for player to enjoy the game and you can join our discord channel for more help regarding how to play the game and provide feedback to us directly.

reviews.review_description: Could you enhance graphics please and bugs other wise this game is great

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and hope you enjoyed the game! We've been trying our best to make it a better game and will continue improving the graphics. Please report any bugs or suggestions in our discord and we'll look into them for sure.

reviews.review_description: I have stickdrift so I need to turn off turning but there's no options to turn it off

developer_response.body: Sorry for any inconvenience. We're working on it and the option will be provided with next release.

reviews.review_description: I build a boat and that's the end!? What's the saltpeter and sulfur for?? And the charcoal!! Where's the rest!?

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing. The 'boat' you crafted is just a sign for opportunities exploring more 'islands'. You can treat it as the achievement for accomplishing episode one and we're keeping adding new features/contents into this game.

Practically there is no end for this open world game and you can keep building, farming, hunting in it as long as you want. Also please check out the multi-play and island customizing features provided. You may find interesting and creative 'hand-made' buildings, such as gardens, villa, church, penthouse, etc., created by other players.

Have fun creating!

reviews.review_description: Want 25% off? Pm me

Great game been playing for quite a while so I ask this how are you gonna incorporate multi-player into the game before you finish making the boat operational it's been sitting on my beach for like almost a year now
Love this game! I'm moving along with what I have but I'm stuck not knowing how to craft the gun powder! Can anyone tell me how? I can't find anything online!!! Please send the info! Lol 😆

developer_response.body:
Thanks for playing and so glad that you love it! You may need to find the 'manuscript
' first before crafting the gun powder. Also try to join our discord channel to get more help from other players (https://discord.gg/8Zfe6CmD). Have fun and happy exploring!

reviews.review_description: It’s the best survival game and I love the climbing although there aren’t as much instructions it’s still not that hard to learn yourself and it’s easy to pick up I definitely recommend it
